About Bishwa Prakash Puri

Bridging research, policy, and practice for sustainable development

👨‍🔬

Professional Overview

I am an interdisciplinary researcher and consultant specializing in climate resilience, hydrology, and sustainable development. Based in Sydney, Australia, I work globally with governments, NGOs, universities, and international organizations to solve complex environmental challenges.

My approach combines rigorous scientific research with practical policy solutions, ensuring that evidence-based strategies lead to real-world impact.

Core Expertise

🌊

Hydrologic Modeling

Advanced modeling using SWAT, HEC-HMS for water resource management and climate impact assessment.

🗺️

GIS & Remote Sensing

Spatial analysis, mapping, and geospatial solutions for environmental monitoring and planning.

📊

Data Science

Python/R analytics, statistical modeling, and data visualization for environmental data.

📋

Policy & Strategy

Climate policy research, sustainability strategy, and institutional capacity building.

🎓

Education & Training

Academic mentoring, workshop facilitation, and professional development programs.

🤝

Consulting

Strategic advisory, project management, and stakeholder engagement for development projects.

Professional Experience

2020-Present

Independent Consultant & Researcher

Leading climate-hydrology projects, policy research, and capacity building initiatives globally.

2018-2020

Assistant Professor

Taught environmental science, conducted research, and supervised graduate students.

2015-2018

Research Fellow

Climate change impact assessment and hydrologic modeling research.

2012-2015

Environmental Consultant

GIS analysis, environmental impact assessment, and sustainability consulting.

Education

PhD in Environmental Science

University of New South Wales, Australia

Focus: Climate change impacts on water resources

Master of Environmental Engineering

Asian Institute of Technology, Thailand

Specialization: Water Resources Management

Bachelor of Civil Engineering

Tribhuvan University, Nepal

Foundation in engineering and environmental systems

Publications & Research

Author of numerous peer-reviewed publications in journals including:

  • Journal of Hydrology
  • Water Resources Research
  • Environmental Science & Technology
  • Climate Risk Management

Research focuses on climate change adaptation, water security, and sustainable development in developing countries.
